写真の位置情報(GPS)を削除してから送る方法｜iPhone・Android・P: How to Remove GPS Location Data From Photos Before Sending: iPhone, Android, and PC
スマホで撮った写真には撮影場所のGPS情報が埋め込まれていることをご存じですか？: Did you know photos taken on a smartphone can carry GPS data showing where they were shot? To keep your home address from leaking through social media or shared files, we explain how to strip location (Exif) data before sending, device by device.
